CustomField.description: Calculated age based on Date of Birth
CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Date_of_Birth__c)), YEAR(TODAY()) - YEAR(Date_of_Birth__c) - IF(OR(MONTH(TODAY()) < MONTH(Date_of_Birth__c), AND(MONTH(TODAY()) == MONTH(Date_of_Birth__c), DAY(TODAY()) < DAY(Date_of_Birth__c))), 1, 0), null)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically calculated age based on the student's DOB
CustomField.label: Age
